prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-SPACEGUNS-PARENT-KPKO Product Type: TOY_GUN Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Sonic Space Blaster Toy Gun with Flashing Lights and Sounds Description: Defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, your little one is busy fighting evil galactic villains and rogue galaxy agents-after dinner and homework of course. And so, to keep their pretend play sessions running at top speed, they'll need the Kidplokio Sonic Space Blaster Toy Gun with flashing, colorful lights and fast-paced blasting sound effects to ensure victory and a safe journey home.

And, let's not forget about the fast-action trigger (this is where the action happens.); upon release of the trigger, the space soldier toy gun sets off an awesome display of colorful, flashing lights in conjunction with wild blasting firing sounds, that makes saving the galaxy even more fun. The toy gun comes WITH batteries, so superhero action can start right out of the box. No screwdrivers, batteries or other tools are required.

A great toy to get your kids off the couch and reduce screen time away from cell phones and computers, the toy gun is action packed, boasting some seriously cool pretend play fighting features that will have kids up on their feet in search of the next intergalactic battle. Whether it's an alien invasion or a space mission to a galaxy far, far away, kids will have a blast indoors or outside with this super fun Kidplokio Space Blaster Galaxy Toy Gun. Made from durable plastic construction to withstand hours of pretend play, the toy gun space soldier galaxy blaster is lightweight and easy for kids to operate.

Available Colors: Blue or Green

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts)

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: boys toy guns toy space blaster galaxy toys super hero kids laser for costumes stocking stuffers action figure pretend play gifts for boys christmas Features: - SONIC SPACE BLASTER TOY GUN: As defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, kids will need the Kidplokio Sonic Space Blaster Toy Gun to keep pretend play space missions running at top speed! Featuring flashing colorful lights and awesome blasting sound effects, aliens and evil galactic villains won't stand a chance! - FAST ACTION TOY GUN TRIGGER: This is where the action happens! Upon the release of the trigger, the Kidplokio interactive toy gun explodes with bright lights and wild blasting sounds for the ultimate in intergalactic fighting fun! - INTERGALACTIC PRETEND PLAY: A great toy to get kids off the couch and reduce screen time from cell phones and computers, the sonic blaster toy gun is action packed, boasting some seriously cool pretend play fighting features that will have kids up on their feet in search of the next alien invasion or cross galaxy mission - NO TOY GUN ASSEMBLY NEEDED: The sonic space blaster toy gun comes assembled with batteries included, so the superhero action can start right out of the box! No screwdrivers, batteries or other tools are required to get this toy gun going - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 10 x 6 x 1.5 inches; Weight: 0.75lbs; Colors: Blue or Green; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Batteries Included; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio Sonic Space Blaster Toy Gun with Lights

tokens.name: Sonic Space Blaster Toy Gun with Lights

openai.item_name: Kidplokio Sonic Space Blaster Toy Gun

anthropic.title_differentiation: Flashing Lights, Blasting Sounds, Fast Action Trigger, Batteries Included, Ages 3 Plus

openai.title_differentiation: Flashing Colorful Lights And Blasting Sounds, Fast Action Trigger, Batteries Included, Durable Plastic, Ages 3 And Up
